title: Overview
description: Track sales, orders, storefront activity, and setup progress in one place.

billing.paymentOverdueDesc: A plan payment was due {date}. Open Billing to finish payment.
billing.paymentDueDesc: A plan payment is due {date}. Open Billing to pay.
billing.paymentDueNoDate: You have an open plan payment. Open Billing to pay.
billing.paymentPastDueDesc: Your paid plan period has ended. Open Billing to pay and continue on this plan.
billing.subscriptionCancelledDesc: This shop is not on an active paid plan. Open Billing to choose a plan.
billing.periodEndingDesc: Your paid period ends {date}. Open Billing to renew.

attention.title: Needs attention
attention.description: Queues and work waiting on you.

trading.title: Trading activity
trading.description: Revenue, orders, and customers from available commerce records.
trading.empty: Commerce activity will appear here after orders are available for this shop.

basket.title: Basket quality
basket.description: Average order value against daily order volume.
basket.empty: Average order value shows up after you have orders with totals.

demand.title: Demand rhythm
demand.description: Which weekdays carry the most order activity.
demand.empty: Weekday demand shows after a few days of orders.

mix.title: Order mix
mix.paymentDesc: Payment state across the recent order sample.
mix.lifecycleDesc: Current lifecycle state for recent orders.

launch.title: Launch Assistant
launch.progressReady: Customers can visit your shop. Keep polishing anytime.
launch.readyBody: Required setup is done. View the live shop or keep editing.
launch.hiddenDesc: Turn it back on from Settings → Preferences.
launch.salesSetupDesc: Store and sales channel still provisioning
launch.catalogEmpty: Add at least one product customers can buy
launch.storefrontSelected: Template selected — customize in the editor
launch.reviewAndPublish: Publish so customers can open the shop
launch.fulfillmentDesc: Confirm delivery, free pickup, and fee
launch.paymentsDesc: Pay on delivery works by default. Add Chapa anytime.
